overview: A modern, high-conversion SaaS technology company website for WebWhistl — a tech solutions provider specializing in scalable SaaS apps, AI/RAG systems, smart chatbots, and digital platforms. Features ngrok-inspired design system with Inter typography, animated SVG data flow diagrams for AI/RAG, e-commerce, and travel use-cases, and a polished single-page experience targeting e-commerce, PG management, and travel businesses.
features: ngrok-inspired design system with Inter font and refined neutral palette
Animated SVG data flow diagrams for AI/RAG, E-commerce, and Travel use-cases
Single-page SPA with smooth anchor-based navigation
Sticky header with glass blur and persistent Book a Demo CTA
Tech stack showcase with 30+ icons grouped by category
Contact form with validation and honeypot spam protection
Floating Schedule a Call CTA (appears after hero scroll)
Fully responsive design with reduced-motion support
